overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a vast desert canyon at sunset, walking along cliff edges with ancient metal ruins in the distance. The clip transitions abruptly to a snowy geothermal landscape at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon cliff edge overlooking river valley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliff edge, surveying the vast canyon landscape and distant ruins

entered.detail: reddish-orange rocky terrain forming the path along the canyon rim
water flowing through the deep canyon below the cliff edge
massive collapsed metal structure resembling a bridge or tower frame
solitary tree growing on the cliff edge
group of cacti on the rocky outcrop

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a desert canyon cliff edge during golden hour, with warm sunlight illuminating the red rock terrain. The vast canyon stretches to the right with a river visible far below, while massive rusted metal ruins stand in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen geothermal valley with hot springs

events.description: abrupt cut from desert canyon to snowy geothermal landscape with blue hot springs

agents.ego_description: walking across the frozen ground toward the steaming geothermal pools

entered.detail: vibrant blue thermal pool with steam rising from the surface
white snow and ice covering the terrain
forest of leafless dead trees lining the thermal area
snow-capped mountains visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene suddenly shifts to a cold, misty geothermal valley where the character walks across snow-covered ground toward vibrant blue hot springs. Dead trees line the left side while misty mountains loom in the background under an overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions abruptly from a warm desert canyon into a cold, misty geothermal valley. It begins with the character walking along a red rock cliff edge during the golden hour, with warm sunlight illuminating the terrain and a river flowing far below. As the camera moves toward massive rusted metal ruins in the distance, the environment suddenly shifts from the arid heat to a frozen landscape. The scene then opens onto snow-covered ground where the character walks past dead trees toward vibrant blue hot springs, while the golden light is replaced by an overcast sky and misty mountains.
